name: manage_source
description: Add, remove, or refresh knowledge source directories. Adding a source will begin indexing all documents in that directory. Removing a source will stop tracking that directory (indexed data is preserved). Updating/refreshing a source path is useful after a user or agent renames or moves a registered source folder, avoiding delete-and-add churn.

action.description: Action to perform: 'add' to register a new source directory, 'remove' to unregister an existing one, or 'update'/'refresh_path' to change the root path for an existing source.

path.description: Directory path to add as a new source or set as the new root for an existing source. Required when action is 'add', 'update', or 'refresh_path'.

source_id.description: ID of the source to remove or update. Required when action is 'remove', 'update', or 'refresh_path'. Use list_sources to find source IDs.
